articles.title: Watch: Moment earthquakes hit airport and buildings in Caracas
articles.description: Video filmed by BBC reporters, contributors and locals shows the aftermath, as frantic residents evacuate.

articles.title: How to cope in a heatwave - according to you
articles.description: From what to wear to getting a restful night's sleep, you share your tips for beating the heat.

articles.title: Reeves backs Burnham to become next prime minister
articles.description: The chancellor throws her support behind the MP for Makerfield despite reports he could demote her if he becomes PM.

articles.title: Bodies found in 'advanced deterioration' at under-fire trust
articles.description: An inspection of NUH mortuaries found 10 shortfalls, the Human Tissue Authority said.
